title: Rename device - close/open the Settings screen
scenario: Renamed device name does not persist after closing and reopening the Device Settings > General screen
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap the device name or gear icon to open Device Settings.
Tap the device's official name field.
Enter a new custom name for the device.
Tap Done to save the new name.
Close the Settings screen (e.g., tap back or exit the app).
Reopen Poly Studio Mobile and navigate back to Device Settings > General.
expected: The new custom device name is displayed in the General settings screen after reopening.
